tasks.label: Check qBittorrent on titan
tasks.command: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=10 titan.local 'echo OK && docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Ports}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -i qbit; echo ---; curl -s http://192.168.2.200:8080/api/v2/app/version 2>/dev/null; curl -s http://192.168.2.200:8090/api/v2/app/version 2>/dev/null; curl -s http://192.168.2.200:8081/api/v2/app/version 2>/dev/null'

tasks.label: Scan qBittorrent for audiobooks
tasks.command: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=10 titan.local 'SID=$(curl -s -c - "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login" --data-urlencode "username=admin" --data-urlencode "password=adminadmin" 2>/dev/null | grep SID | awk "{print \$NF}"); if [ -z "$SID" ]; then echo "LOGIN_FAILED"; exit 1; fi; echo "=== COMPLETED TORRENTS ==="; curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?filter=completed&sort=added_on" --cookie "SID=$SID" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; torrents=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f\"[{i+1}] {t[\"name\"]} | {t[\"size\"]/1073741824:.1f}GB | {t[\"state\"]} | {t[\"save_path\"]}\") for i,t in enumerate(torrents)]"'

tasks.label: Get qBit completed torrents JSON
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local 'SID=$(curl -s -c - "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login" --data-urlencode "username=admin" --data-urlencode "password=adminadmin" | grep SID | awk "{print \$NF}"); curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?filter=completed&sort=added_on" --cookie "SID=$SID"' > /tmp/qbit-torrents.json 2>/dev/null && echo "Saved $(wc -l < /tmp/qbit-torrents.json) lines" && python3 -c "
import json
with open('/tmp/qbit-torrents.json') as f:
    torrents = json.load(f)
for i, t in enumerate(torrents):
    gb = t['size'] / 1073741824
    print(f'[{i+1}] {t[\"name\"]} | {gb:.1f}GB | {t[\"state\"]} | {t[\"save_path\"]}')
"

tasks.label: Check all qBit torrents and categories
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local 'SID=$(curl -s -c - "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login" --data-urlencode "username=admin" --data-urlencode "password=adminadmin" | grep SID | awk "{print \$NF}"); echo "=== CATEGORIES ==="; curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/categories" --cookie "SID=$SID"; echo; echo "=== ALL TORRENTS (audio-related) ==="; curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?sort=added_on&reverse=true" --cookie "SID=$SID" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
torrents = json.load(sys.stdin)
for t in torrents:
    name = t.get(\"name\",\"\")
    if any(kw in name.lower() for kw in [\"audio\",\"audiobook\",\"mp3\",\"m4b\",\"m4a\",\"flac\",\"book\",\"unabridged\",\"narrated\"]):
        print(json.dumps({k: t[k] for k in [\"name\",\"size\",\"state\",\"save_path\",\"category\",\"added_on\",\"content_path\"] if k in t}, indent=2))
        print(\"---\")
"'

tasks.label: Get torrents by audiobooks and books category
tasks.command: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local 'SID=$(curl -s -c - "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login" --data-urlencode "username=admin" --data-urlencode "password=adminadmin" | grep SID | awk "{print \$NF}"); echo "=== AUDIOBOOKS CATEGORY ==="; curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?category=audiobooks&sort=added_on" --cookie "SID=$SID" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -E '"name"|"state"|"size"|"save_path"|"content_path"|"added_on"' | head -60; echo; echo "=== BOOKS CATEGORY ==="; curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?category=books&sort=added_on" --cookie "SID=$SID" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -E '"name"|"state"|"size"|"save_path"|"content_path"|"added_on"' | head -60'

tasks.label: Get audiobooks category torrents
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "SID=\$(curl -s -c - http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login --data-urlencode username=admin --data-urlencode password=adminadmin | grep SID | awk '{print \$NF}'); curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?category=audiobooks&sort=added_on' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\"" > /tmp/qbit-audiobooks.json 2>/dev/null && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open('/tmp/qbit-audiobooks.json') as f:
    torrents = json.load(f)
print(f"Found {len(torrents)} audiobook torrents")
for i, t in enumerate(torrents):
    gb = t['size'] / 1073741824
    name = t.get('name', '?')
    state = t.get('state', '?')
    added = t.get('added_on', '?')
    print(f"[{i+1}] {name}")
    print(f"    Size: {gb:.1f}GB | State: {state} | Added: {added}")
    print()
PYEOF

tasks.label: Check books category and uncategorized torrents
tasks.command: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "SID=\$(curl -s -c - http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login --data-urlencode username=admin --data-urlencode password=adminadmin | grep SID | awk '{print \$NF}'); echo '=== BOOKS ==='; curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?category=books&sort=added_on' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\" | python3 -c \"import sys,json; ts=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Found {len(ts)}'); [print(t.get('name','?')) for t in ts]\"; echo; echo '=== UNCATEGORIZED ==='; curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?category=&sort=added_on' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\" | python3 -c \"import sys,json; ts=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Found {len(ts)}'); [print(t.get('name','?')) for t in ts]\""

tasks.label: Get ALL qBit torrents with categories
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "SID=\$(curl -s -c - http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login --data-urlencode username=admin --data-urlencode password=adminadmin | grep SID | awk '{print \$NF}'); curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?sort=added_on&reverse=true' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\"" > /tmp/qbit-all.json 2>/dev/null && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open('/tmp/qbit-all.json') as f:
    torrents = json.load(f)
print(f"Total torrents: {len(torrents)}")
print()
for i, t in enumerate(torrents):
    gb = t['size'] / 1073741824
    name = t.get('name', '?')
    state = t.get('state', '?')
    cat = t.get('category', '(none)')
    added = t.get('added_on', '?')[:10] if isinstance(t.get('added_on'), str) else '?'
    print(f"[{i+1}] [{cat}] {name}")
    print(f"    {gb:.1f}GB | {state} | added: {added}")
PYEOF

tasks.label: Check audiobook files on disk and active downloads
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "
echo '=== AUDIOBOOK DIRECTORY ON DISK ==='
ls -la /data/torrents/audiobooks/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Directory does not exist or is empty'
echo
echo '=== ACTIVE DOWNLOADS ==='
SID=\$(curl -s -c - http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login --data-urlencode username=admin --data-urlencode password=adminadmin | grep SID | awk '{print \$NF}')
curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?filter=downloading' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\" | python3 -c \"import sys,json; ts=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Found {len(ts)} downloading'); [print(f'{t.get(\\\"name\\\",\\\"?\\\")} | {t.get(\\\"state\\\",\\\"?\\\")} | {t.get(\\\"progress\\\",0)*100:.1f}%') for t in ts]\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No active downloads'
echo
echo '=== RECENTLY ADDED FILES IN DOWNLOADS ==='
find /data/torrents/downloads -type f -mtime -14 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'Cannot access'
"

tasks.label: Search for audiobook files on titan
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "
echo '=== SEARCHING FOR M4B/MP3 IN TORRENTS ==='
find /data/torrents -name '*.m4b' -o -name '*.m4a' 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo
echo '=== QBIT SAVE PATHS ==='
SID=\$(curl -s -c - http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login --data-urlencode username=admin --data-urlencode password=adminadmin | grep SID | awk '{print \$NF}')
curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/app/defaultSavePath' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\"
echo
echo '=== TORRENT CONTENT PATHS (last 5) ==='
curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?sort=added_on&reverse=true&limit=5' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\" | python3 -c \"import sys,json; [print(t.get('content_path','?')) for t in json.load(sys.stdin)]\"
"

tasks.label: Check Allen Carr audiobook and search for audio files
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "
echo '=== ALLEN CARR AUDIOBOOK ==='
ls -la '/data/torrents/mac/Allen Carr - Easyway to stop smoking - audiobook/' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Path not found'
echo
echo '=== SEARCH FOR AUDIO FILES IN MAC DIR ==='
find '/data/torrents/mac' -type f \( -name '*.mp3' -o -name '*.m4b' -o -name '*.m4a' -o -name '*.flac' -o -name '*.ogg' \) 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo
echo '=== SEARCH AUDIO FILES EVERYWHERE ==='
find /data/torrents -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name '*.mp3' -o -name '*.m4b' -o -name '*.m4a' \) 2>/dev/null | head -30
"

tasks.label: Final summary - check qBit torrents and incomplete downloads
tasks.command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null titan.local "
echo '=== ALL TORRENTS WITH AUDIO/AUDIOBOOK/BOOK IN NAME ==='
SID=\$(curl -s -c - http://localhost:8080/api/v2/auth/login --data-urlencode username=admin --data-urlencode password=adminadmin | grep SID | awk '{print \$NF}')
curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?sort=added_on' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\" | python3 -c \"
import sys, json
torrents = json.load(sys.stdin)
for t in torrents:
    name = t.get('name','')
    nl = name.lower()
    if any(kw in nl for kw in ['audio','book','mp3','m4b','m4a','flac','unabridged','narrated']):
        print(f\"  {t.get('category','?'):12s} {t.get('state','?'):12s} {t.get('size')/1e6:.0f}MB  {name}\")
\"
echo
echo '=== INCOMPLETE/PAUSED TORRENTS WITH POTENTIAL AUDIO ==='
curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/torrents/info?filter=paused&sort=added_on' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\" | python3 -c \"
import sys, json
torrents = json.load(sys.stdin)
for t in torrents:
    name = t.get('name','')
    nl = name.lower()
    if any(kw in nl for kw in ['audio','book','mp3','m4b','m4a','flac','unabridged','narrated']):
        print(f\"  {t.get('category','?'):12s} {t.get('state','?'):12s} {t.get('progress')*100:.0f}% done  {name}\")
\"
echo
echo '=== QBITTORRENT VERSION ==='
curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/v2/app/version' --cookie \"SID=\$SID\"
"

tasks.label: Check qBit torrents for audiobooks simply
tasks.command:
cat > /tmp/qbit-check.py << 'PYEOF'
import json, sys
with open('/tmp/qbit-all.json') as f:
    torrents = json.load(f)
keywords = ['audio', 'book', 'mp3', 'm4b', 'm4a', 'flac', 'unabridged', 'narrated']
found = []
for t in torrents:
    name = t.get('name', '')
    nl = name.lower()
    if any(kw in nl for kw in keywords):
        found.append(t)
if found:
    print(f"Found {len(found)} audiobook-related torrents:")
    for t in found:
        gb = t['size'] / 1e9
        print(f"  [{t.get('category','?')}] {t.get('state','?'):12s} {gb:.1f}GB  {t.get('name','?')}")
        print(f"    content: {t.get('content_path','?')}")
else:
    print("No audiobook-related torrents found.")
    print("\nAll torrents:")
    for t in torrents:
        print(f"  [{t.get('category','?'):10s}] {t.get('name','?')}")
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/qbit-check.py
